title: Quick Update for Whatsapp Notify
excerpt: Many of my users ask for this feature of Custom Templates. Now you can send custom messaging from your monday to any WhatsApp Number using new automation. You can also schedule the messaging.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Many of my users ask for this feature of Custom Templates. Now you can send custom messaging from your monday to any WhatsApp Number using new automation. You can also schedule the messaging.

image2396×1324 310 KB

posts.author: juanzevallos (Juan Jose)
posts.cookedHtml: This is so good. The whatsapp needs to be Business account or Whatsapp api?

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @juanzevallos to get started, you don’t need anything Most of my users use an automated number I’ve set up (though you’re free to bring your own number too).

The idea is to let users test and experience the app quickly and without friction. As you probably know, using your own number can be tricky especially if you don’t already have a Meta Business Account.

To use your own number, you’d need:

  • A Meta Business Account
  • A separate WhatsApp Business number

That’s a bit too much setup for some users, but yes, my app fully supports it and a few users do choose to go that route.

posts.author: juanzevallos (Juan Jose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Okay, I understand! So, there is an option where you provide the number to be used, and that number is used to send notifications?
From what I can see, is the app’s function only to send notifications, or can it also be used to have a conversation?

I would love to learn more. If you can, please send me a Calendly link so we can meet for about 15-20 minutes.
